blended.narrative: Stratton is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,283 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 43°F.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
